Bash(/c/Users/aldoh/miniconda3/python << 'PYEOF'
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

conn = sqlite3.connect\(r'C:\\Users\\aldoh\\Documents\\RApplication\\data\\mydb.db'\)

# Get tickers and sectors
tickers_df = pd.read_sql\("SELECT Symbol as ticker, Sector as sector FROM ScannerUniverse WHERE IsActive = 1", conn\)
relevant = tickers_df[tickers_df.sector.str.contains\('Material|Metal|Mining|Energy|Industr|Oil|Gas', case=False, na=False\)]

tickers_list = relevant.ticker.tolist\(\)
placeholders = ','.join\(['?'] * len\(tickers_list\)\)
ohlcv = pd.read_sql\(f"SELECT date, ticker, Open, High, Low, Close, Volume FROM mrbreakouts_cache WHERE ticker IN \({placeholders}\) ORDER BY ticker, date", conn, params=tickers_list\)
ohlcv = ohlcv.dropna\(subset=['Open','High','Low','Close','Volume']\)
conn.close\(\)

def run_backtest\(ohlcv, relevant, squeeze_thresh, vol_decline_thresh, rng_pct_thresh, daily_ret_thresh, vol_surge_thresh, label\):
    results = []
    for tkr in ohlcv.ticker.unique\(\):
        df = ohlcv[ohlcv.ticker == tkr].sort_values\('date'\).reset_index\(drop=True\)
        if len\(df\) < 55:
            continue
        
        sector_vals = relevant[relevant.ticker == tkr].sector.values
        if len\(sector_vals\) == 0:
            continue
        sector = sector_vals[0]
        
        for i in range\(50, len\(df\)\):
            window_20 = df.iloc[i-20:i]
            window_40 = df.iloc[i-40:i]
            window_50 = df.iloc[i-50:i]
            today = df.iloc[i]
            yesterday = df.iloc[i-1]
            
            range_20 = window_20.High.max\(\) - window_20.Low.min\(\)
            range_40 = window_40.High.max\(\) - window_40.Low.min\(\)
            if range_40 == 0:
                continue
            squeeze_ratio = range_20 / range_40
            
            vol_20 = window_20.Volume.mean\(\)
            vol_50 = window_50.Volume.mean\(\)
            if vol_50 == 0:
                continue
            vol_ratio = vol_20 / vol_50
            
            low_20 = window_20.Low.min\(\)
            high_20 = window_20.High.max\(\)
            if high_20 == low_20:
                continue
            rng_pct = \(today.Close - low_20\) / \(high_20 - low_20\)
            
            daily_return = \(today.Close - yesterday.Close\) / yesterday.Close
            near_high = today.Close >= high_20 * 0.995
            
            vol_surge = today.Volume >= vol_20 * vol_surge_thresh
            
            is_breakout = \(squeeze_ratio < squeeze_thresh and 
                           vol_ratio < vol_decline_thresh and 
                           rng_pct >= rng_pct_thresh and 
                           daily_return >= daily_ret_thresh and 
                           near_high and 
                           vol_surge\)
            
            if is_breakout:
                ret_5d = ret_10d = ret_15d = ret_20d = max_ret_20d = max_dd_20d = None
                
                if i + 5 < len\(df\):
                    ret_5d = \(df.iloc[i+5].Close - today.Close\) / today.Close * 100
                if i + 10 < len\(df\):
                    ret_10d = \(df.iloc[i+10].Close - today.Close\) / today.Close * 100
                if i + 15 < len\(df\):
                    ret_15d = \(df.iloc[i+15].Close - today.Close\) / today.Close * 100
                if i + 20 < len\(df\):
                    ret_20d = \(df.iloc[i+20].Close - today.Close\) / today.Close * 100
                
                if i + 20 < len\(df\):
                    future_highs = df.iloc[i+1:i+21].High.max\(\)
                    max_ret_20d = \(future_highs - today.Close\) / today.Close * 100
                elif i + 1 < len\(df\):
                    future_highs = df.iloc[i+1:].High.max\(\)
                    max_ret_20d = \(future_highs - today.Close\) / today.Close * 100
                
                if i + 20 < len\(df\):
                    future_lows = df.iloc[i+1:i+21].Low.min\(\)
                    max_dd_20d = \(future_lows - today.Close\) / today.Close * 100
                elif i + 1 < len\(df\):
                    future_lows = df.iloc[i+1:].Low.min\(\)
                    max_dd_20d = \(future_lows - today.Close\) / today.Close * 100
                
                results.append\({
                    'ticker': tkr,
                    'sector': sector,
                    'date': int\(today.date\),
                    'close': round\(today.Close, 2\),
                    'daily_ret': round\(daily_return * 100, 2\),
                    'squeeze_ratio': round\(squeeze_ratio, 3\),
                    'vol_decline': round\(vol_ratio, 3\),
                    'rng_pct': round\(rng_pct, 3\),
                    'vol_surge_x': round\(today.Volume / vol_20, 2\),
                    'ret_5d': round\(ret_5d, 2\) if ret_5d is not None else None,
                    'ret_10d': round\(ret_10d, 2\) if ret_10d is not None else None,
                    'ret_15d': round\(ret_15d, 2\) if ret_15d is not None else None,
                    'ret_20d': round\(ret_20d, 2\) if ret_20d is not None else None,
                    'max_ret_20d': round\(max_ret_20d, 2\) if max_ret_20d is not None else None,
                    'max_dd_20d': round\(max_dd_20d, 2\) if max_dd_20d is not None else None,
                }\)
    
    results_df = pd.DataFrame\(results\)
    print\(f"\\n{'='*80}"\)
    print\(f"=== {label} ==="\)
    print\(f"=== Params: squeeze<{squeeze_thresh}, vol_decline<{vol_decline_thresh}, rng>={rng_pct_thresh}, daily_ret>={daily_ret_thresh*100}%, vol_surge>={vol_surge_thresh}x ==="\)
    print\(f"{'='*80}"\)
    print\(f"\\nBREAKOUT SIGNALS FOUND: {len\(results_df\)}"\)
    
    if len\(results_df\) == 0:
        return results_df
    
    # Deduplicate
    results_df = results_df.sort_values\(['ticker', 'date']\)
    filtered = []
    for tkr in results_df.ticker.unique\(\):
        tkr_df = results_df[results_df.ticker == tkr]
        last_date = 0
        for _, row in tkr_df.iterrows\(\):
            if row.date - last_date >= 5:
                filtered.append\(row\)
                last_date = row.date
    results_df = pd.DataFrame\(filtered\)
    
    print\(f"After dedup \(5-day gap\): {len\(results_df\)}"\)
    
    print\(f"\\n=== ALL BREAKOUT SIGNALS ==="\)
    pd.set_option\('display.max_columns', 20\)
    pd.set_option\('display.width', 250\)
    pd.set_option\('display.max_rows', 200\)
    print\(results_df.to_string\(index=False\)\)
    
    print\(f"\\n=== SUMMARY STATISTICS ==="\)
    print\(f"Total breakouts: {len\(results_df\)}"\)
    print\(f"\\nBy sector:"\)
    print\(results_df.groupby\('sector'\).size\(\).to_string\(\)\)
    
    for period, col in [\('5d', 'ret_5d'\), \('10d', 'ret_10d'\), \('15d', 'ret_15d'\), \('20d', 'ret_20d'\)]:
        valid = results_df[col].dropna\(\)
        if len\(valid\) > 0:
            print\(f"\\n--- {period} Forward Returns ---"\)
            print\(f"  N = {len\(valid\)}"\)
            print\(f"  Mean: {valid.mean\(\):.2f}%"\)
            print\(f"  Median: {valid.median\(\):.2f}%"\)
            print\(f"  Win rate \(>0%\): {\(valid > 0\).mean\(\)*100:.1f}%"\)
            print\(f"  Win rate \(>3%\): {\(valid > 3\).mean\(\)*100:.1f}%"\)
            if \(valid > 0\).any\(\):
                print\(f"  Avg winner: {valid[valid > 0].mean\(\):.2f}%"\)
            else:
                print\(f"  No winners"\)
            if \(valid <= 0\).any\(\):
                print\(f"  Avg loser: {valid[valid <= 0].mean\(\):.2f}%"\)
            else:
                print\(f"  No losers"\)
    
    valid_max = results_df['max_ret_20d'].dropna\(\)
    valid_dd = results_df['max_dd_20d'].dropna\(\)
    if len\(valid_max\) > 0:
        print\(f"\\n--- Best Possible Exit \(20d window\) ---"\)
        print\(f"  Mean max gain: {valid_max.mean\(\):.2f}%"\)
        print\(f"  Median max gain: {valid_max.median\(\):.2f}%"\)
        print\(f"  Mean max drawdown: {valid_dd.mean\(\):.2f}%"\)
        print\(f"  Median max drawdown: {valid_dd.median\(\):.2f}%"\)
        if valid_dd.mean\(\) != 0:
            print\(f"  Avg reward/risk: {abs\(valid_max.mean\(\) / valid_dd.mean\(\)\):.2f}"\)
    
    print\(f"\\n=== PER-TICKER BREAKDOWN ==="\)
    for tkr in results_df.ticker.unique\(\):
        tkr_df = results_df[results_df.ticker == tkr]
        print\(f"\\n{tkr} \({tkr_df.sector.iloc[0]}\): {len\(tkr_df\)} breakouts"\)
        for _, row in tkr_df.iterrows\(\):
            print\(f"  Date {row.date}: ${row.close} | day +{row.daily_ret}% | squeeze={row.squeeze_ratio} | vol_surge={row.vol_surge_x}x | 5d={row.ret_5d}% | 10d={row.ret_10d}% | 20d={row.ret_20d}% | max={row.max_ret_20d}% | dd={row.max_dd_20d}%"\)
    
    return results_df

# STRICT criteria
strict_df = run_backtest\(ohlcv, relevant, 
    squeeze_thresh=0.65, vol_decline_thresh=0.90, rng_pct_thresh=0.65, 
    daily_ret_thresh=0.015, vol_surge_thresh=1.2, label="STRICT CRITERIA"\)

# RELAXED criteria
relaxed_df = run_backtest\(ohlcv, relevant,
    squeeze_thresh=0.70, vol_decline_thresh=0.95, rng_pct_thresh=0.65,
    daily_ret_thresh=0.015, vol_surge_thresh=1.2, label="RELAXED CRITERIA \(squeeze<0.70, vol_decline<0.95\)"\)

print\(f"\\n{'='*80}"\)
print\(f"=== COMPARISON ==="\)
print\(f"{'='*80}"\)
print\(f"Strict: {len\(strict_df\)} signals"\)
print\(f"Relaxed: {len\(relaxed_df\)} signals"\)
if len\(strict_df\) > 0 and len\(relaxed_df\) > 0:
    for col in ['ret_5d','ret_10d','ret_20d']:
        s_valid = strict_df[col].dropna\(\)
        r_valid = relaxed_df[col].dropna\(\)
        if len\(s_valid\) > 0 and len\(r_valid\) > 0:
            print\(f"\\n{col}: Strict mean={s_valid.mean\(\):.2f}% \(N={len\(s_valid\)}\) vs Relaxed mean={r_valid.mean\(\):.2f}% \(N={len\(r_valid\)}\)"\)
            print\(f"  Strict WR={\(\(s_valid>0\).mean\(\)*100\):.1f}% vs Relaxed WR={\(\(r_valid>0\).mean\(\)*100\):.1f}%"\)

PYEOF)
